headline: Standard Chartered deploys SC GPT to 70,000+ employees across 41 markets in one of global banking's largest GenAI rollouts
the_so_what: A simultaneous 41-market deployment to 70,000 employees — covering operational productivity, sales, engineering, and risk management — with ten additional markets in the pipeline makes SC GPT one of the most geographically broad AI rollouts in banking, establishing a cross-border deployment template that peers with complex multi-jurisdiction operations will be benchmarked against.
summary: Standard Chartered launched SC GPT on March 27, 2025 — a proprietary generative AI platform deployed simultaneously to over 70,000 employees across 41 markets. The platform covers four core use cases: operational productivity, sales and marketing revenue generation, software engineering automation, and risk management. Group CEO Bill Winters stated that effective GenAI adoption is 'an operational imperative for all banks'. Ten additional markets are in the expansion pipeline, making SC GPT one of the most geographically broad AI deployments in global banking.

key_stat.label: Standard Chartered employees with access to SC GPT across 41 markets

verified_claims: SC GPT launched March 27, 2025 (Standard Chartered official press release)
Four use cases: operational productivity, sales/marketing, software engineering, risk management (press release)
Quote from Group CEO Bill Winters confirmed (press release)
_governance.notes: All claims sourced directly from Standard Chartered official press release dated March 27, 2025. human_approved: Track 2 entry written directly from verified landscape source.
